title: You Are My Poison!
description: a small mod that allows you to secretly add potions to any food, troll your friends or enemies while mixing some poison to their food without them knowing!
body:
# You Are My Poison! A small mod that allows you to secretly add potions to any food, troll your friends or enemies while mixing some poison to their food without them knowing! **available for both fabric and forge**

Just right click with any potion in offhand with your food in main hand and it would do the trick but be aware that it may produces some noise, so do it in secret Test your food on your pets to stay safe! or maybe test it on your friends :) advanced tooltips were slightly changed to hide nbt count in food items, this way you really cant know which item was changed! lingering potion would affect the entire stack instead of just one item, you are also not limited to just one potion effect, you can add countless effects to the food **note:** - the mod is completely server side, you can still include it in client as it provides some extra hand movements - if on fabric, requires fabric api version 0.91.0
